description: Use this API routine to return an array of integer values for subsystem induction machines. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, iarray = aindmacint(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem induction machines to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the bus and/or induction machine quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API routine to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for all in-service induction machines at in-service subsystem buses (type code 1, 2 or 3).
for all induction machines at in-service subsystem buses (type code 1, 2 or 3).
for all in-service induction machines at subsystem buses, even if the bus to which it is connected is out-of-service (type code 4).
for all induction machines at all subsystem buses.
for all in-service induction generators at in-service subsystem buses (type code 1, 2 or 3).
all induction generators at in-service subsystem buses (type code 1, 2 or 3).
for all in-service induction generators at subsystem buses, even if the bus to which it is connected is out-of-service (type code 4).
for all induction generators at all subsystem buses.
for all in-service induction motors at in-service subsystem buses (type code 1, 2 or 3).
all induction motors at in-service subsystem buses (type code 1, 2 or 3).
for all in-service induction motors at subsystem buses, even if the bus to which it is connected is out-of-service (type code 4).
for all induction motors at all subsystem buses.

string.description: Machine standard code (1 for NEMA, 2 for IEC).
Power setpoint code (1 for mechanical, 2 for electrical).
Machine base power code (1 for mechanical, 2 for electrical).
Mechanical torque variation code (1 for simple power law, 2 for WECC model).
Grounding impedance data input/outout (I/O) code (1 for per unit, 2 for ohms).
Grounding code (0 for an ungrounded machine, 1 for a grounded machine).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of IARRAY, is not large enough.
Sequence data not in case (when STRING = ‘CZG’ or ‘CGR’).
